title: Fresh Sleeping Villagers
description: This pack is an add-on of Fresh Animations that make Villagers remove their gears when they sleep.
body:
![SLEEPING VILLAGERS : FRESH ANIMATIONS EDITION](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6741703471599ff92305d4cabf0cc6febf2490d7.png)

#

This pack gives Villagers proper rest during the night. When they sleep, they take off their gears, hat and shoes (exept the nitwit, he doesn't want to remove his jacket).

This version of the pack is an add-on of *Fresh Animation*.

# Dependencies

### REQUIRED MODS (you need one of the 2 options below)
- [OptiFine](https://www.optifine.net/home)
- [Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) and [Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)

### REQUIRED PACK
- [Fresh Animations](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/fresh-animations)

### KNOWN COMPATIBLE PACKS (with advised order for the packs)
1. [Working Armorers](https://modrinth.com/project/working-armorers)
2. [Zombie Villager Gloves](https://modrinth.com/project/zombie-villager-gloves)
3. [Fresh Villagolems](https://modrinth.com/project/fresh-villagolems)
4. [ Fresh Sleeping Villagers ]
5. [Fresh Animations Extensions](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations-extensions)
6. [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations)
7. [Unique Spawn Eggs](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/1-13-1-16-unique-spawn-eggs)

### KNOWN UNCOMPATIBLE PACKS
- Villagolems Classic
- Villagolems Swapped
- Sleeping Villagers
- Baby Villagers
- Villager Variety

# External Credit
- [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations) by [FreshLX](https://modrinth.com/user/FreshLX)
